ocr_findings.description: Three system diagrams (シンプレックス / デュプレックス / デュアル) rendered as image placeholders img-0, img-1, img-2 — diagrams cannot be expressed as text, expected behaviour
'試験にはコレが出る！' banner icon rendered as 'つし' — stylised mascot text partially misread, cosmetic only

reviewer_notes: Section 10-02 システム構成による分類, showing three architecture diagrams and a 試験コレ summary box. The two bullet-point definitions (デュプレックスシステム and デュアルシステム) are faithfully reproduced verbatim. Diagrams are image placeholders which is correct. No text loss or character errors in the prose.
